question.text: Exchange-Traded Currency Derivatives (ETCD) in India are traded in which segment of stock exchanges?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** ETCD are traded in a separate segment called Currency Derivatives Segment (CDS). Interest rate derivatives also trade in CDS. Trading and settlement are conducted by two distinct entities: Exchange (trading) and Clearing Corporation (settlement). **The Trap:** Equity derivatives have their own segment; commodity derivatives are on MCX/NCDEX. **Cross-Exam Context:** Segment classification is tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** A broker needs separate membership for CDS to trade currency derivatives.
